CustomField.formula: IF(AND(TECH_BuisnessDaysElapsed__c = 0,ISPICKVAL(Status,"New"),ISPICKVAL(LeadSource,"Demande de contact site"),ISBLANK(Apporteur_affaires__c)), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "green", 20, 20), IF(AND(TECH_BuisnessDaysElapsed__c = 1,ISPICKVAL(Status,"New"),ISPICKVAL(LeadSource,"Demande de contact site"),ISBLANK(Apporteur_affaires__c)), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "yellow", 20, 20), IF(AND(TECH_BuisnessDaysElapsed__c > 1,ISPICKVAL(Status,"New"),ISPICKVAL(LeadSource,"Demande de contact site"),ISBLANK(Apporteur_affaires__c)), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "red", 20, 20), "" )))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Drapeau vert 2 jours restant Drapeau orange 1 jour restant Drapeau rouge dernier jour restant
CustomField.label: Temps de traitement restant
